positive.prompt: 查一下贵州茅台近三年营业收入和净利润
assertions: uses mx-data rather than model memory
query includes entity, metrics, and period
reports generated Excel or JSON path

positive.prompt: 比亚迪最近一年每个交易日的收盘价和成交量
assertions: warns if output may be large

negative.prompt: 今天新能源板块上涨的原因是什么
筛选市盈率低于20且ROE大于15%的股票
